name: ESPHome OTA Updates
description: ESPHome's Over-The-Air (OTA) platform to allow remote updating of devices.

config_entries.label: Password
config_entries.description: The password to use for updates.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID used for code generation.

config_entries.label: Allow Partition Access
config_entries.description: Only on esp32. Allow updating more partition types. Used for updating the partition table and the bootloader. Defaults to false.

config_entries.label: Port
config_entries.description: The port to use for OTA updates. Defaults.

config_entries.label: Version
config_entries.description: Version of OTA protocol to use. Version 2 is more stable. To downgrade to legacy ESPHome, the device should be updated with OTA version 1 first. Defaults to 2.
